heading_content_part: Right to equal service. We will not discriminate against you if you exercise your privacy rights.Right to delete. You may submit a verifiable request to close your account and we will delete Personal Information about you that we have collected.In order to verify your identity when you make a request, you will be required to log in to your password-protected account or respond to an email verification request.

heading_content_part: You have a right to tell us that you do not want us to share your personal information with third parties, apart from the permitted share under this Privacy Policy and CCPA. We hereby inform you that we do not sell the Personal Information of our users or share it in exchange for any value to any parties. We only share your Personal information in manners and for purposes described above, which include solely business purposes.

You can find this information in sections II and III of this Privacy Policy.
